description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, octagonal barrel and a wooden grip. The frame and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, while the trigger guard and hammer are highlighted in a brass or gold-toned metal. The grip is smoothly contoured and made of polished wood, providing a comfortable hold. The cylinder is robust and metallic, designed to hold multiple rounds, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century Colt or Remington revolvers, with a focus on durability and traditional craftsmanship. The object features detailed mechanical components, including a visible hammer, trigger, and loading gate.
description: A classic revolver-style firearm with a long, dark metal barrel and a polished wooden grip, featuring brass accents and detailed mechanical parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wooden grip, and brass trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, grip, and metallic frame from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the top of the hammer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long octagonal barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
